name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change to the playbook, bootstrapper, or templates
labels: enhancement

## The problem

<!-- What concrete pain or failure mode are you trying to address? Evidence beats anecdote. -->

## The change you want

<!-- What should CTO in a Box do differently? Be specific. -->

## Why this fits the defaults

<!-- Does this sharpen the existing defaults, or is it an override? If it's an override, what real constraint justifies it? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about, and why is this better? -->
